title: hieracium lanatum subsp. phlomidifolium
intro: Hieracium lanatum subsp. phlomidifolium, also known as a type of hairy hawk's-beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium lanatum subsp. phlomidifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
